description_long: This object is a compact, boxy coffee machine with a predominantly gray body and a glossy black top section. The front features a recessed area likely for placing a cup, with a visible metallic or reflective tray and a small spout above it. The top has a hinged, rectangular lid with a golden-brown translucent panel, possibly for accessing the water reservoir or coffee grounds. The sides are plain, with one side showing a small control panel with buttons or indicators. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with clean lines and a sturdy appearance. The machine appears suitable for countertop use in urban environments such as offices, cafes, or home kitchens.
description: A compact, modern coffee machine with a gray body, glossy black top, and a golden-brown translucent lid. Features a front cup tray, small spout, and a side control panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed cup tray, spout, and glossy black top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the raised golden-brown lid and a small control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the golden-brown lid and a plain gray surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the raised lid and a plain gray side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A small rectangular control panel with a few buttons or indicators located on the side of the machine.
